query:
-- Check what contact states exist on hot projects with no send_ready contact
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.crmOrphan,
  c.rejectionReason IS NOT NULL as has_rejection,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY c.enrichmentSource, c.enrichmentStatus, c.contactTrustTier, c.crmOrphan, has_rejection
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check what contact states exist on hot projects with no send_ready contact
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.crmOrphan,
  c.rejectionReason IS NOT NULL as has_rejection,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY c.enrichmentSource, c.enrichmentStatus, c.contactTrustTier, c.crmOrphan, has_rejection
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
